skill.name: am-i-a-tiger
skill.author: az9713
skill.description:
For individual contributors who suspect they're carrying more organizational weight than their job title suggests.
Analyzes your actual contribution patterns across git, Slack, and issue trackers to reveal if you're a "tiger" -
one of those key people who actually keeps things running when something breaks.
Use when you want to understand your real organizational impact, prepare for performance reviews,
or figure out if you're being undervalued.
Keywords: am I important, my contributions, invisible work, undervalued, tiger team, performance review,
impact assessment, what do I actually do, recognition, career growth
